confirmed_skills.evidence: Managed buying and merchandising for women's bottom-wear categories at Go Colors; built fashion category from scratch at SuperK.
Expanded assortment from 5 to 25+ subcategories; analyzed sales for 200+ SKUs and recommended adjustments that improved sell-through by 15%.
Managed PO/PI coordination across 20+ suppliers and 10+ factories, ensuring 95% on-time delivery.
Used advanced Excel (VLOOKUP, pivot tables, dashboards) for tracking sell-through, AOV, margin; built WIP trackers.
Experience in women’s and girls’ bottom-wear categories including leggings, track pants, ethnic bottoms; launched casualwear and accessories lines.
At SuperK, managed fashion category across online channels and tech-enabled retail network of 3+ COCO stores; previously sold via Instagram and Swiggy Minis.
Basic SAP for PO/inventory tracking at Go Colors; utilized Metabase dashboards for performance analysis.
Partnered with marketing, operations, supply chain, and VM teams to launch campaigns and improve stock availability.
Negotiated vendor pricing, MOQs, and sourcing terms, improving product margins from 22% to 35%.
